thesis: VCP with tight tightening (12.73% last contraction), strong RS (66.21), all 8 Minervini criteria passed, near pivot at 136.53 provides support. Fundamentals solid (B grade, 57% EPS growth). Volume drying is minor concern but pattern strength offsets.
